zh.lifeSummary: Christian de Ledet Heiress of Baybrook是Walter DeLedet的女兒，於1250年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。她和Sir John le Latimer Lord of Danby至少有1個兒子。她去世於1300年之後在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ledet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Emile, Leonce, Angelle, Antoine, Aurelie, Camille, Etienne, Ferrel, Gillis, Gisele.

French: variant of Ledé, from le dé, meaning either ‘the thimble’ or ‘the die’, hence used as a metonymic occupational name for a stitcher or tailor, or as a nickname for a gambler. Compare Leday 1 and Ledee 2.

History: Antoine Livaudais Ledet from La Rochelle in Charente-Maritime, France, married first Marguerite Willig in Edgard, LA, in 1788, and second Victoire-Françoise Quimine in Plattenville, LA, in 1797.

variants.name: Ledee
meanings: French (Ledée and Lédée): variant of Ledé (see Ledet ). This surname is also found in the West Indies, including Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Leday
meanings: Americanized form of French   Ledet  . This surname is found mainly in LA and TX, and is borne mainly by African Americans. Compare   Lada   5.
In some cases possibly also French: variant, with fused masculine definite article le, of Day , a habitatonal name from Day in the Ardennes.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: Christian de Ledet Heiress of Baybrook was born in 1250, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Walter DeLedet. She had at least 1 son with Sir John le Latimer Lord of Danby. She died after 1300, in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian de Ledet Heiress of Baybrookは1250年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークでWalter DeLedetの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir John le Latimer Lord of Danbyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1300年以後にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ハーボロウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian de Ledet Heiress of Baybrook(은)는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 Walter DeLedet의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir John le Latimer Lord of Danby(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 하르버루그h에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Christian de Ledet Heiress of Baybrook родилась в 1250 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Walter DeLedet. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir John le Latimer Lord of Danby. Она умерла после 1300 г. в местности маркет харбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
